title: A Minecraft Movie: Cinema Weapons
description: Adds 2 weapons themed around the cinema experience of the A Minecraft Movie.
body:
# Everyone always makes mods about the a movie itself, but never the actual experience watching it.

**Well, I've got you all covered! (all of you like 2 people that thought the same.)**

Introducing Movie.

This is absolute cinema indeed.

**This mod introduces 2 new weapons and a couple other items like popcorn and soda, all of which will be explained below.**

**(Check the gallery if you want a more simple explanation.)**

## Progression:

**The first thing you will need to do is find a Farmer Villager.**

**They will now sell you Popcorn and Soda themed around the a movie.**
  - **Eating and drinking them will leave you with the empty container.**

**If you then happen to find a chicken jockey, then you'd be surprised to see it drops a new item, the Illager Token Pass.**
  - **Using this, you can make the 2 new weapons out of the popcorn and soda.**

## Crystallized Soda Sword

**The crystallized soda sword is a blade made out of ice, amethyst, and soda.**
  - **Right clicking will cause a soda sweep attack, which will throw out soda in front of you, damaging whatever is in the way.**
  - **Has a custom enchantment, Releasing Beam, which turns the sweep attack into a beam of soda.**

## Popcorn Rocket Launcher

**The popcorn rocket launcher is a literal rocket launcher, that can shoot popcorn fireworks.**
  - **(Yes, this is the cinema experience, stay with me!!)**
  - **This can shoot out Popcorn Rockets, another new item that is crafted with fireworks and popcorn.**
  - **The rocket projectile travels in a straight line, and will explode throwing popcorn everywhere upon collision.**

**Has 3 custom enchantments, Infinite Set, Rocket Armor, and Popper.**
  - **Infinite Set works just like infinity on a bow, where as long as you have at least 1 ammo in your inventory, you can keep shooting it and it will not be used up.**
  - **Rocket Armor makes the rocket travel through a couple entities it hits. Though, sometimes it bounces off them instead.**
  - **Popper replaces the rocket functionality with one like a party popper. Instead of using popcorn rockets, it uses popcorn buckets. This also works with Infinite Set.**
  - **Entities in front of you will be damaged by the party popper functionality.**
